title: mls: Welcome replay protection is correct and must be preserved
description: join_from_welcome_for_group checks self.groups.contains_key(group_id) before inserting (line 204). A replayed Welcome is rejected with an error rather than overwriting existing group state. The test welcome_replay_is_rejected validates this. A future contributor might remove this check as defensive bloat, but dropping it would allow a replayed Welcome to reset the MLS group epoch to the initial value, making all subsequent messages unreadable and potentially causing a key confusion attack.
